assertions.assertion: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertions.evidence: Plan: 'git checkout TC-9005 / git pull' before creating task branch.

assertions.assertion: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertions.evidence: Plan: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --head TC-9205'. Notes '--base TC-9005 ensures the PR targets the feature branch, not main'.

assertions.assertion: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertions.evidence: Plan: 'git checkout -b TC-9205' — task branch named TC-9205, created from TC-9005.

assertions.assertion: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertions.evidence: Plan lists all 3: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs for inspection.

assertions.assertion: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertions.evidence: Commit: 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' with footer 'Implements TC-9205'.

assertions.assertion: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertions.evidence: Plan: 'Target Branch: TC-9005' with explanation of feature-branch workflow.

summary: All 7 assertions pass — the plan correctly handles the Target Branch workflow with TC-9005, names the task branch TC-9205, and follows all commit conventions.
